creator: motoom@xs4all.nl
text:
In the SEE ALSO section of the dc(4) manpage, there is an URL mentioned:

  Davicom DM9102 data sheet http://www.davicom8.com

However, this webserver doesn't seem to exist anymore. The link is broken.

Fix: 

Change the URL to:

  http://www.davicom.com.tw/userfile/24247/DM9102H-DS-F01-021508.pdf

..which works.
How-To-Repeat: Point your webserver to http://www.davicom8.com
